/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/prog.dir/src/core/schema.cpp.o CMakeFiles/prog.dir/src/engine/table.cpp.o CMakeFiles/prog.dir/src/index/bplus_tree.cpp.o CMakeFiles/prog.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/prog.dir/src/query/executor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/prog.dir/src/query/parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/prog.dir/src/storage/file_storage.cpp.o -o prog
